summary: Zac Gallen, a right-handed pitcher, faces the Marlins' lineup, which may struggle against righties. Max Meyer, also a right-handed pitcher, will be on the mound for the Marlins, but Gallen's presence gives the Diamondbacks a slight edge.
lean: Slight lean toward Diamondbacks based on starting pitching advantage.
